## Problem

What expressive gap or inefficiency does this address?

## Proposal

The element, grammar change, or new certified tokenizer.

## Admission evidence

Per INTENT.md admission criteria:
- Lexicon additions: audit output showing worst-case cost in every certified tokenizer.
- Grammar changes: before/after parses showing parse determinism is preserved.
- Compression claims: token counts before and after on the example corpus.

## Alternatives considered

What else you weighed, and why this wins.
